summary: 31 tests passed, 100.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: chunk_text() returns list[Chunk] with correct text segments
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented chunk_text() in ingestion/chunker.py that returns list[Chunk]. Tests TestChunkTextReturnType verify return type is list, elements are Chunk instances, text content is non-empty, and all chunk text is a substring of the original.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Default chunk_size=512 and overlap=64 match API contract
completion_promises.evidence: Function signature uses chunk_size: int = 512 and overlap: int = 64 as defaults. Tests TestDefaultParameters verify chunks don't exceed 512 chars, overlap text exists between consecutive chunks, and inspect.signature confirms default values match contract.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Text shorter than chunk_size produces exactly 1 chunk
completion_promises.evidence: RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter naturally returns single chunk for short text. Tests TestShortText verify short text produces exactly 1 chunk, the chunk contains the full text, and text exactly at chunk_size also produces 1 chunk.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty text returns empty list (no chunks)
completion_promises.evidence: Guard clause at top of chunk_text() returns [] if text is empty or whitespace-only. Tests TestEmptyText verify empty string returns [], whitespace-only returns [], and return type is list.

completion_promises.criterion_text: source_metadata is copied into each chunk's metadata dict
completion_promises.evidence: Each chunk gets a fresh metadata dict via dict.update() from source_metadata, ensuring copies not shared references. Tests TestSourceMetadata verify metadata keys attached to all chunks, None metadata produces chunk_index only, metadata dicts are independent copies, and empty dict is accepted.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each chunk's metadata includes sequential chunk_index (0-based)
completion_promises.evidence: chunk_index is set via enumerate() in the loop: metadata['chunk_index'] = index. Tests TestChunkIndex verify first chunk has index 0, indices are sequential for multi-chunk text, and single chunk has index 0.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Custom chunk_size and overlap parameters are respected
completion_promises.evidence: chunk_size and overlap are passed directly to RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter. Tests TestCustomParameters verify custom chunk_size limits chunk length, larger overlap produces more chunks, smaller chunk_size produces more chunks, and zero overlap works.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on all modified files (ingestion/chunker.py, ingestion/tests/test_chunker.py, ingestion/__init__.py). All checks passed with zero errors.
